seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Drillham and Drillham South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Drillham vs Drillham South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Drillham and Drillham South.
heading: Drillham vs Drillham South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Drillham, Queensland and Drillham South, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Drillham has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Drillham South (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Drillham or Drillham South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Drillham has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Drillham South scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Drillham scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Drillham South scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Drillham or Drillham South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Drillham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
